data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. VANZANT HAYZE was in the placings last time but prior to that clocked a speedy 23.80 win over 407m at this track. Rates a top chance if runs up to time two back. 1. SPRING OLIVER finds it hard to win but looks close to breaking through. Finished second (24.15) at this track last time making it two minors on end. Good beginner assisted by the inside draw. Expected to feature again. 7. BARGARA KILLIAN has been beaten for early speed lately, last time finishing eighth (27.74) in a Mix 5 at this track. Safe beginner but wide box to overcome and will need some luck. Has ability and is one of the better chances. 8. SLICK RAM has strong claims after a top-three finish at this track and distance last time out.","runners":[2,1,7,8],"exclusive":false}
